channel.title: Hopped-Up Gaming: East
channel.description: Eastern Canadian Craft Beer and Video Games Podcast

item.title: Ep 290 - Obadin Stellar Enterprises - 07/08/2019
item.description:
It’s really hot, and no number of blue coloured lights are going to help cool things down. Come join The HUGE Crew as they sweat and talk about The Thing, Deception: Murder in Hong Kong, Stranger Things season 3, Stellaris, TIS-100, Bloodstained, The Sinking City, Super Mario Maker 2, and… Dark Souls…
As always keep sending questions to hoppedupeast@gmail.com, we love them!
Beer featured this week: Hop Trip - American Noble Citra by Garrison Brewing Company and Electric City by Tusket Falls Brewing Company.

item.title: Ep 289 - Can birds hear while they're flying? - 07/01/2019
item.description:
Happy Canada Day!
Something must have gotten into the beer this week, so buckle up for a wild ride!
On the show this week The HUGE Crew talks about Rat kings, Breath of the wild DLC, Outer Wilds, Star Wars mailing systems, Subway commercials, Neon Genesis Evangelion, Bloodstained, Manual Smelling, and Canada Facts…..?
We’re (Not) Sorry
As always keep sending questions to hoppedupeast@gmail.com, we love them!
Beer featured this week: Mocha Oatmeal Stout by Propeller Brewing Company and Maudite by Unibroue.

item.title: Ep 288 - Rogue Like Like - 06/24/2019
item.description:
As long as there are new beers and new video games in the world, you can count on The HUGE Crew to completely ignore them and stick to their old favourites. This week is a small exception because there are some new games, AND a special guest on the show! Andrew Shouldice, creator of the game TUNIC sits down with The HUGE Crew to talk about the work, life, and game development. You can follow Andrew on twitter at @dicey and you can find out more info about TUNIC at http://www.tunicgame.com.
You can also expect to hear about Sea of Thieves, Vermintide 2, Super Mario Bros: The Lost Levels, Cadence of Hyrule, Polytopia, and more!
As always keep sending questions to hoppedupeast@gmail.com, we love them!
Beer featured this week: Island Time by Breton Brewing Company and Hawaiian Pale Ale by Hammond River Brewing Company.

item.title: Ep 287 - Growling About E3
item.description: Matthew is on vacation this week, but that won't stop the rest of the HUGE crew from gathering around the microphone, drinking some more growlers, and going over all the pretty sights and sounds that happened at E3 this year. Beers This Week: Alexander Keith's Le Passage Sour Gose and Bier de Garde(n)

item.title: Ep 286 - Printed Audiobooks - 06/10/2019
item.description:
It’s that time of the year again! The HUGE Crew fill their growlers and talk about their E3 2019 predictions! It’s a wild mess this year as we come up some truly out there ideas! Oh, and a growler kind of exploded on us, so that contributed to the mess!
As always keep sending questions to hoppedupeast@gmail.com, we love them!
Beer featured this week: Growlers of stuff!

item.title: Ep 285 - Beached Thing - 06/03/2019
item.description:
Happy New Week! On this episode of the podcast, Ben, Matt, Tim, and Evan talk about Observation, John Wick 3, Brightburn, Magic the Gathering, Layers of Fear 2, Death Stranding trailers, and, more! Make sure to stick around for the second half of the show this week: The HUGE Crew play an audio guessing game about the soundtracks from TV shows, Games, and Movies! It's a hoot!
As always keep sending questions to hoppedupeast@gmail.com, we love them!
Beer featured this week: After Hours: Sasquatch Pale Ale by Propeller Brewing Company and CBA | Canadian Black Ale by Picaroons Traditional Ales.

item.title: Ep 284 - Gravity Bucket - 05/27/2019
item.description:
If you ever have questions about science just ask The HUGE Crew, they’re the experts! They’re also experts on beer and video games, so why don’t you sit and listen to their latest thoughts on Observation, Soyuz Space Capsules, Star Wars Imperial Assault, The Thing Board Game, and more!
The HUGE Crew also takes some time to discuss some of their pet peeves with modern video game design!
As always keep sending questions to hoppedupeast@gmail.com, we love them!
Beer featured this week: After Hours: Snowbird Juicy IPA by PEI Brewing Company (Gahan) and Barking Squirrel Amber Lager by Hop City Brewing Co.

item.title: Ep 283 - Started Yelling Holocron - 05/20/2019
item.description:
Hi folks! This week I’m writing the show notes at “Number 1 Fan of the Show” Ryan’s house and he said not to bother writing anything creative this week because no-one reads these. So anyhoo, here’s a list of the things we talked about this week:
-Our latest radio appearance -Life is Strange 2 -Dragon Ball FighterZ DLC -Smash Bros Ultimate DLC -Building a drafting cube for Star Wars Destiny -Super Mario Maker 2 news -Santa Clarita Diet -X-wing 2.0 -iZombie -Observation
As always keep sending questions to hoppedupeast@gmail.com, we love them!
Beer featured this week: Nuts Over You by Chill Street Fresh Beer & Cider Market and Lemondrop by Garrison Brewing Company.

item.title: Ep 282 - Heavenly Cans - 05/13/2019
item.description:
The HUGE Crew is back to their regular nonsense with a proper podcast this week! Come join the gang as they talk about Dark Souls 2 (againnnnn?), Celeste (yay!), Steam World Quest (toot toot!), Life is Strange 2 (oh no, bugs!), and more!
As always keep sending questions to hoppedupeast@gmail.com, we love them!
Beer featured this week: Day 6 With Brett Blueberry by Big Spruce Brewing and Strawberry Rhubarb Kettle Sour by Breton Brewing Company.

item.title: Ep 281 - The Internet is Broken - 05/06/2019
item.description:
Our podcast host was down all of last week, so we decided livestream a board game instead of recording a regular episode! Come join The HUGE Crew as they play Mansions of Madness Second Edition!
As always keep sending questions to hoppedupeast@gmail.com, we love them!
Beer featured this week: Delirium Nocturnum by Huyghe Brewery and 2019 Commissar by Unfiltered Brewing.
